queries.question: Which frequent flyer lounges have complimentary Wi-Fi and which VIP lounges have the same amenity?
queries.sql:
SELECT Lounge.Name 
FROM Lounge
WHERE (Lounge.exclusiveArea = "Frequent Flyer Lounge" OR Lounge.exclusiveArea = "VIP Lounge") AND Lounge.amenities = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?lounge a :Lounge .
  ?lounge p:name ?name .
  ?lounge p:exclusiveArea ?exclusivearea_w .
  ?lounge p:exclusiveArea ?exclusivearea_w2 .
  ?lounge p:amenities ?amenities_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?exclusivearea_w) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge" || STR(?exclusivearea_w2) = "VIP Lounge")) && STR(?amenities_w) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"))
}

queries.question: Show me frequent flyer lounges and VIP lounges with complimentary Wi-Fi.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lounge.Name 
FROM Lounge
WHERE Lounge.exclusiveArea = "Frequent Flyer Lounge" OR Lounge.exclusiveArea = "VIP Lounge" AND Lounge.amenities = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?lounge a :Lounge .
  ?lounge p:name ?name .
  ?lounge p:exclusiveArea ?exclusivearea_w .
  ?lounge p:exclusiveArea ?exclusivearea_w2 .
  ?lounge p:amenities ?amenities_w .
  FILTER((STR(?exclusivearea_w) = "Frequent Flyer Lounge" || (STR(?exclusivearea_w2) = "VIP Lounge" && STR(?amenities_w) = "Complimentary Wi-Fi")))
}
